examples: A kleptomaniac is a compulsive thief who steals because he or she cannot help it.
Nina, also befriended by a sassy kleptomaniac called Toni who takes her on a thieving spree, is no one's daughter.
Flora has a brother (Max Minghella) who is shopping around for religious experience, and a mother (Juliette Binoche) whose kleptomaniac leanings point to a calamity in her past.
